title: No Void
description: ❌ Prevents death by the Void in EVERY dimension!
body:
## ❌ NoVoid
Never lose your stuff to the void again.

The data pack / mod adds that you can't die from the Void, not just in the End, but also in the Overworld and the Nether.
In the Overworld and the Nether, you are teleported to the Bedrock level and a small room is created for you. In the End, you are teleported upwards and slowly fall back down.

**Disclaimer:** This is NOT a Void Totem. You will be saved automatically even without a totem.

## 📚 How to Install the Datapack
### 👤 Singleplayer
Drag the downloaded .zip file into the ```"\.minecraft\saves\YOURWORLD\datapacks"``` folder.
Now enter your world. You can check whether the datapack is enabled with /datapack list. You may have to ```/reload```.
### 👥 Multiplayer (Server)
Drag the downloaded .zip file into the datapack folder, which is located in the default "world" folder.
Now join your server. You can check whether the datapack is enabled with /datapack list.
